property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Users\vinicius\.codex\tmp\arg0\codex-arg0FvXlOa;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Users\vinicius\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;A:\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1.1\bin;A:\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\vinicius\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\vinicius\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\vinicius\AppData\Local\OpenAI\Codex\bin\ada252862d154cdd;C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\OpenAI.Codex_26.519.5221.0_x64__2p2nqsd0c76g0\app\resources;.

testcase.name: testUpdateTransaction
testcase.system-out:
18:27:08.155 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.monify.TransactionServiceTest]: TransactionServiceTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 18:27:08.207 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.monify.MonifyApplication for test class com.monify.TransactionServiceTest

Sistema de OrganizaÃ§Ã£o Financeira] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table accounts ( balance numeric(12,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, name varchar(255) not null, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('CHECKING','SAVINGS','CASH','INVESTMENT')), primary key (id), unique (user_id, name) ) 2026-05-25T18:27:09.998-03:00 DEBUG 43972 --- [MONIFY - Sistema de OrganizaÃ§Ã£o Financeira] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table categories ( id bigint generated by default as identity, color varchar(255), icon varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) 2026-05-25T18:27:09.999-03:00 DEBUG 43972 --- [MONIFY - Sistema de OrganizaÃ§Ã£o Financeira] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table credit_cards ( last_four varchar(4) not null, limit_amount numeric(12,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, brand varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id), unique (user_id, name) ) 2026-05-25T18:27:10.000-03:00 DEBUG 43972 --- [MONIFY - Sistema de OrganizaÃ§Ã£o Financeira] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table spending_limits ( amount numeric(12,2) not null, reference_month varchar(7) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, category_key varchar(255) not null, category_name varchar(255) not null, limit_type varchar(255) check (limit_type in ('EXPENSE','INCOME')), primary key (id), unique (user_id, category_key, reference_month, limit_type) ) 2026-05-25T18:27:10.001-03:00 DEBUG 43972 --- [MONIFY - Sistema de OrganizaÃ§Ã£o Financeira] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table transactions ( amount numeric(38,2) not null, date date not null, category_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, description varchar(255) not null, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('INCOME','EXPENSE')), primary key (id) ) 2026-05-25T18:27:10.002-03:00 DEBUG 43972 --- [MONIFY - Sistema de OrganizaÃ§Ã£o Financeira] [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table users ( created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), email varchar(255) not null unique, name varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-05-25T18:27:10.003-03:00 DEBUG 43972 --- [MONIFY -
